label: Now Developing
items: China escalated pressure in the West Philippine Sea through both ecology and access, with Manila alleging cyanide sabotage near Ayungin and Reuters imagery showing a renewed Scarborough barrier setup.
Sara Duterte’s impeachment case shifted into audit-trail territory as House hearings focused on confidential-funds movements, COA disallowances, and documentary irregularities.
The week’s diaspora pressure point was scale: Middle East repatriation passed 6,700 Filipinos as DMW spending hit ₱1.2 billion and reintegration became part of the crisis story.
